subcodes.first_line: This is an epistle from Him Who is imprisoned unto her who hath believed in her Lord and was among those who remember Him, and who hath recognized her Lord [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی المسجون الی التی آمنت بربها و کانت من الذاکرات و عرفت ربها فی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
